pull-request-header:
## 🚀 Release — Pending Promotion

> This PR was automatically generated by [release-please](https://github.com/googleapis/release-please).
> It tracks all releasable changes since the last release across all applications.

### 📋 What happens when this PR is merged?

| Step | Action |
|------|--------|
| 1️⃣  | `package.json` versions are bumped per app |
| 2️⃣  | `CHANGELOG.md` files are updated per app |
| 3️⃣  | One GitHub Release + git tag is created per app |
| 4️⃣  | Promotion pipeline triggers — `latest-dev` → stable image |

> ⚠️ **Do not squash merge.** Use a standard merge commit to preserve commit attribution for future releases.

---
pull-request-footer: --- ### 🔍 Before merging, verify - [ ] Dev images are healthy in the dev environment - [ ] No pending hotfixes that should be included in this release - [ ] CHANGELOG entries are accurate and meaningful 🤖 Generated by release-please • Promotion handled by promote.yml
